Staff Software Engineer - Platform Infrastructure

YYY is a fast-growing B2B SaaS company serving the fintech industry. We help
financial institutions modernize their payment processing infrastructure.

About the Role

We're looking for a Staff Software Engineer to join our Platform Infrastructure team.
You'll design and build the foundational services that all product teams depend on,
including API gateways, service mesh, observability, and deployment tooling.

What You'll Do
- Design and implement core platform services used by 20+ product engineering teams
- Lead technical design reviews and establish architectural standards
- Build and maintain our internal developer platform (IDP) to improve developer velocity
- Own the API gateway layer handling 100M+ requests/day
- Collaborate with Security, SRE, and Product Engineering teams
- Mentor senior and mid-level engineers

Requirements
- 7+ years of software engineering experience
- Expert-level proficiency in Go or Java
- Strong experience with Python for tooling and automation
- Deep knowledge of distributed systems, microservices, and API design
- Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and container orchestration at scale
- Proficiency with cloud platforms (AWS preferred)
- Experience with observability tools (Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus)
- Strong communication skills and experience leading technical discussions
- BS or MS in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to Have
- Experience with service mesh (Istio, Envoy)
- Contributions to open-source projects
- Experience in fintech or payments domain
- Familiarity with gRPC and protocol buffers

Our Values
- Move fast with confidence
- Build for the long term
- Transparency and trust
- Customer obsession
